ArrayList<>.reasoning: In Python, the equivalent of Java's `ArrayList<>` is a list of lists. The outer list corresponds to ArrayList in Java and can contain any type of elements (in this case, it contains lists). Each inner list corresponds to an individual element of the ArrayList in Java and holds strings. Therefore, we use List[List[str]] as the equivalent Python type.
